Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Sadaputas disappearance

Social · asked by user [] · 2008-09-26 · 16 answers
Was Sadaputas death a staged assassination by the new world order crowd? Certainly, he was a great threat to their eugenicist agenda. Looking for real information about his supposed heart attack/drowning. The hit men for these types(NWO) are becoming quite expert at faking "natural cause" type deaths with modern technology. Please see this
http://www.infowars.com/?p=4602
user [2] · 2008-09-26
Krishna controls ultimately the appearance and disappearance of great devotees. Krishna rakhe mare ke...
I spoke a few times with him and believe me, he was no ordinary devotee.
Unfortunately, anything can be a good excuse to abound in one'b4s favorite theme.
user [160] · 2008-09-27
Yes, Prabhupada said he was a great soul. Krishna sometimes allows other devotees or non-devotees to be the apparent cause of a devotees death."In the rainy season, rain is predestined, and yet people take precautions to protect themselves. Similarly, in the age of Kali the symptoms as above mentioned(Note: see entire purport) are sure to infiltrate into social life, but it is the duty of the state to save the citizens from the association of the agents of the age of Kali." From purport Bhag. 1.16.11
Mishra Prabhu , your last comment seems to be some sort of subtle put down. If any sinister group were actually targeting devotees , do you think that all of us should just chant Hare Krishna and accept it as Krishnas mercy?
As I mentioned initially, I am looking for actual details surrounding his death. I am always suspicious whenever these are not forthcoming For example , was he alone at the time? Was an autopsy performed?
user [19] · 2008-09-29

Looking for real information about his supposed heart attack/drowning. The hit men for these types(NWO) are becoming quite expert at faking "natural cause" type deaths with modern technology. http://www.infowars.com/?p=4602[/quote]

user [160] · 2008-09-30
Funny how no one can answer the core questions...For example , was he alone at the time? Was an autopsy performed? Etc. You can believe what you like about Alex. That is not the point. I want to know the details surrounding Sadaputas death.
user [2] · 2008-10-01
John Ralston Saul a well known worldwide lecturer, says that to conspire at those levels you need a lot of intelligence which they usually fail to show.
Even the downfall of ISKCON is not a conspiracy. Just a bunch of materially affected people that think they are right and they create havoc functioning on the low level modes of nature, all the way passing as *official* successors of Srila Prabhupada
user [160] · 2008-10-01
Heres a link in which you may be interested--- http://www.skousen2000.com/political%20products/capitalist.htm
user [160] · 2008-10-01
Quote from Professor Carroll Quigley- Author of "Tragedy and Hope"
"There does exist, and has existed for a generation, an international Anglophile network which operates, to some extent, in the way the radical Right believes the Communists act. In fact, this network, which we may identify as the Round Table Groups, has no aversion to cooperating with the Communists, or any other groups, and frequently does so. I know of the operations of this network because I have studied it for twenty years and was permitted for two years, in the early 1960s, to examine its papers and secret records. I have no aversion to it or to most of its aims and have, for much of my life, been close to it and to many of its instruments. I have objected, both in the past and recently, to a few of its policies (notably to its belief that England was an Atlantic rather than a European Power and must be allied, or even federated, with the United States and must remain isolated from Europe), but in general my chief difference of opinion is that it wishes to remain unknown, and I believe its role in history is significant enough to be known." (p. 950}
user [19] · 2008-10-02
so then they killed sadaputa, that article proves it. We are not saying that these demoniac groups dont exist. We are saying that dont think they control evrything because they dont. They will get sick, age and die like evryone else. And if you are into psyops and all that check your sources because alex jones being a cheater is conspiracy theorist 101.
user [38] · 2008-10-02
I dont see any proof, sorry.
user [2] · 2008-10-03
[quote][cite] Gadai:[/cite]Funny how no one can answer the core questions...For example , was he alone at the time? Was an autopsy performed? Etc. You can believe what you like about Alex. That is not the point. I want to know the details surrounding Sadaputas death.[/quote]
HIs family would probably answer all those questions, but it is unlikely you will ask them now, just a matter of etiquette. I used to live in the conspiracy world.
The whole material world is a conspiracy against the sweet will of the Lord. Happy now? :)
user [160] · 2008-10-05
Well, that was a very interesting and unexpected response. Still , no facts. All Ive heard through the dandavats site is that he was found at the bottom of his swimming pool. This seems to imply that no one was around at the time. Usually, as far as I know, when there is an unattended death, an autopsy is required. Waiting to hear the results of this autopsy if one was performed. If no autopsy , then how can anyone say for sure that no foul play was involved? Taser marks , chemicals in the blood and other subtle traces could easily go undetected by anyone but a medical professional.
user [160] · 2008-10-03
Of course, I am trying to avoid disturbing the family at this time. I thought perhaps someone monitoring this site would know some details. Apparently not. I have not attempted to offer any proof of a murder conspiracy; only suspicion of such. I would be happy to hear of details that would dissolve this suspicion.
Every state in America has laws for prosecuting conspiracy. There are many conspiracies, subtle and gross. Obviously, not everything is conspiratorial(in the mundane sense).
user [337] · 2008-10-04
relatives and close friends of sadaputa know the reason. sadaputas death was not a staged assassination by the new world order crowd nor an assassination by anyone. sadaputa was extremely depressed regarding the situation in iskon and because of that he did not live a longer life. if iskon leaders would have taken iskon in a different course sadaputa would still be alive today.
user [23] · 2008-10-06
Ive heard from various sources that he was swimming, that he drowned, that he had a heart attack, that he was fully clothed, that he was a good swimmer, and that he was on anti-depressants. I have no idea what really happened.
user [160] · 2008-10-07
If he truly was fully clothed, THAT IS suspicious.
user [337] · 2008-10-10
sadaputa was found by his wife. autopsy performed
